title: [CRITICAL] Test STOP keyword opt-out
description: Send STOP from test phone to GHL number. Verify: GHL/Twilio recognizes it, contact marked opted-out, ALL SMS workflows stop, VAPI calls stop. TCPA violation if this fails.

title: [CRITICAL] Verify timezone consistency
description: Check GHL sub-account timezone, n8n server timezone, VAPI timezone. All must match. 8am calling hours must mean 8am in LEAD'S timezone.

title: [CRITICAL] Test first contact speed (<60s)
description: Create contact in GHL with your cell. Add to pipeline as New Lead stage. Verify: Opportunity created, tag applied, SMS within 60s, VAPI call within 2min.

title: [CRITICAL] Verify max call attempts cap
description: Track AI_Call_Attempt field. Let all calls go to voicemail. Document: What is the max? Does system stop calling after X attempts? Infinite calls = harassment.

title: Test business hours SMS logic
description: Note time when creating contact. Verify: Daytime SMS during 8am-8pm, after-hours SMS outside. SMS tone must match time of day.

title: Test VAPI call - lead books appointment
description: Answer VAPI call, tell Sarah you want estimate, give time. Verify: Sarah sounds natural, captures details, n8n fires, GHL updated, rep gets SMS, lead gets confirmation.

title: Test VAPI call - no answer retry logic
description: Create NEW contact, let VAPI ring to voicemail. Verify: n8n gets no-answer result, AI_Call_Attempt increments, second call in ~2 hours.

title: Test VAPI call - not interested handling
description: Answer VAPI call, say 'No thanks, not interested.' Verify: Sarah handles gracefully, tag not_interested applied, opportunity to Lost, removed from workflows.

title: Test VAPI call - callback request
description: Answer VAPI call, say 'Call me back tomorrow.' Verify: Sarah acknowledges, tag callback_requested applied, task created for rep, no immediate retry.

title: Test calling hours enforcement (8am-8pm)
description: Create contact AFTER 8pm local. Verify: SMS may send, VAPI call does NOT fire outside hours, call queues until 8am next day.

title: Test nurture sequence starts
description: Use no-answer contact from 1.4. Verify: Contact enrolled in Lead_Nurture_Sequence, first nurture SMS arrives.

title: Test Day 1-3 nurture cadence timing
description: Monitor test contact over days. Log timestamps. Verify: Touch 1 Day 1, Touch 2 Day 3, messages during business hours only.
blocked_reason: Multi-day test - start and monitor over 3+ days

title: Test SMS reply stops nurture drip
description: After receiving nurture SMS, reply 'Yes I'm interested.' Verify: SMS_Receiver fires, webhook to n8n, tag engaged applied, REMOVED from nurture, no more auto SMS.

title: Test engaged tag stops sequence
description: Manually add tag 'engaged' to contact mid-nurture. Verify: At next cycle, workflow detects tag, exits, sends webhook, no more SMS.

title: Test full 6-touch nurture completion
description: Let all 6 touches play out without replying (14 days). Verify: All 6 SMS at correct intervals, workflow ends cleanly, enters Long_Term_Nurture or exits.
blocked_reason: 14-day test - start and set reminder to check

title: Test inbound SMS - pricing question
description: Send SMS: 'What's the price for a roof inspection?' Verify: Classified as pricing intent, appropriate response sent, contact tagged engaged.

title: Test inbound SMS - booking intent
description: Send SMS: 'Can I book for Tuesday at 2pm?' Verify: Classified as booking, booking link/appointment created, removed from nurture.

title: Test inbound SMS - negative/opt-out
description: Send SMS: 'Stop texting me.' Verify: Classified as opt-out, removed from all sequences, no further messages, tag not_interested applied.

title: Test inbound SMS - ambiguous response
description: Send SMS: 'Maybe' or thumbs up emoji. Verify: Asks clarifying question OR routes to rep, does NOT auto-book, rep notified.

title: Test appointment → rep notification
description: Create appointment in GHL. Verify: Workflow fires, webhook to n8n /webhook/rep-appt, rep gets SMS at +17744443510 within 30s with name/time/address.

title: Test appointment confirmation to lead
description: Same appointment from 4.1. Verify: Confirmation SMS sent to lead, confirmation email sent, removed from conflicting workflows.

title: Test appointment reminder timing
description: Book appointment 24+ hours out. Verify: 24h before email, 2h before SMS, no stale reminders for past appointments. Check which system owns this.

title: Test no-show stage change triggers
description: Move contact to No Show stage. Verify: tag no_show applied, webhook to /webhook/no-show fires, n8n 7-Day Rebook starts.

title: Test no-show first SMS (within 5 min)
description: Continue from 5.1. Verify: First SMS within 5 min of no-show marking, empathetic tone, offers to reschedule.

title: Test no-show VAPI recovery call
description: Monitor after 5.2. Verify: VAPI call from Sarah No-Show Recovery (f90488f9), empathetic rebook tone, respects 8am-8pm hours.

title: Test full 7-day no-show cadence
description: Let full cadence run. Verify: Day 0 SMS+call, Day 1-7 touchpoints, all respect 8am-8pm, ends cleanly after 7 days.
blocked_reason: 7-day test - start and log each touchpoint

title: Test no-show rebook stops cadence
description: During 7-day cadence, reply 'Sorry I missed it, can we reschedule?' Verify: Caught by handler, tagged engaged, cadence STOPS, new appointment created.

title: Test showed stage tagging
description: Move contact to Showed stage. Verify: Tag showed applied, n8n Rep Show/No-Show Check detects (runs every 15 min).

title: Test won stage victory path
description: Move contact to Won stage. Verify: Tags customer/won applied, all outreach stops, marked as customer.

title: Test lost stage clean exit
description: Move contact to Lost stage. Verify: Removed from ALL workflows, no further SMS/calls/emails, opportunity marked.

title: Test n8n polling check (every 6h)
description: Move contact to Showed, wait for poll cycle. Verify: n8n Rep Won/Lost Check executes on schedule, detects contacts from past 48h.
blocked_reason: Runs every 6h - verify execution in n8n logs

title: Test duplicate lead handling
description: Create contact with same phone as existing. Document: Does GHL dedupe? If duplicate, only ONE set of automations runs (no double-messaging).

title: Test contact with no phone number
description: Create contact with email only. Verify: SMS/VAPI skip gracefully, system doesn't error, email touchpoints still work.

title: Test rapid SMS replies (spam prevention)
description: Send 5 SMS in 2 minutes. Verify: Each fires to n8n, doesn't send 5 auto-responses, some throttle logic prevents flooding.

title: Test workflow collision (nurture + no-show)
description: Check if contact in nurture who no-shows gets double-messaged. Verify: No-show REMOVES from nurture first, no overlap.

title: Test n8n workflow failure recovery
description: Check n8n error handling. Verify: Failed executions logged, error notifications sent, contacts don't get stuck.

title: Test VAPI call drops mid-conversation
description: Answer call, talk 30s, hang up abruptly mid-sentence. Verify: Gets incomplete result, NOT treated as booked or not-interested, re-enters retry.

title: Test Sarah vs Sarah No-Show tone
description: Compare initial call (1.3) vs no-show call (5.3). Verify: Initial uses Sarah (a02b7113) excited tone, No-show uses (f90488f9) empathetic tone.

title: Test VAPI + GHL tool integration
description: During VAPI call, trigger each tool. Verify: Sarah can lookup contact, book appointments, update fields, check availability. All <3s latency.

title: Test VAPI call to landline
description: Use landline number as test contact. Verify: VAPI call goes through, SMS fails silently, contact not stuck.

title: Test call + SMS timing overlap
description: Watch timing in test 1.1. Verify: SMS arrives first, VAPI follows, lead not on phone when SMS arrives, sequencing is clean.

title: Test DND flag stops everything
description: Enable DND on test contact in GHL. Verify: No SMS sent, no calls made, workflows skip or remove, no errors.

title: Test after-hours compliance
description: Create contact at 9pm. Verify: No VAPI calls after 8pm, document SMS behavior, all 19 no-show actions respect hours.

title: Test consent tracking
description: Review contact after form submission. Verify: Lead source captured, timestamp recorded, can answer 'how did you get my number?'

title: Test weekend behavior
description: Create contact on Saturday. Document: Are SMS sent? Are VAPI calls made? Is no-show recovery active? Must be INTENTIONAL.

title: Test wait node accuracy
description: Trigger workflow with 2 hour wait. Verify: Fires within ±5 min, waits don't stack, survives n8n restart.

title: Test appointment timezone on rep SMS
description: Book appointment, check rep SMS. Verify: Time matches actual appointment, timezone explicit or correct local time.

title: Test contact fields survive round-trip
description: Create contact with name/phone/email/address. After VAPI round-trip: Verify all unchanged, new fields added correctly, no null overwrites.

title: Test opportunity value tracking
description: Check opportunity after each stage. Document: Initial value, after appointment, after won. Does value update correctly?

title: Test tag conflicts
description: Manually add both engaged AND not_interested to same contact. Verify: Handled gracefully, one takes priority, not stuck in two workflows.

title: Verify webhook payload completeness
description: Check n8n logs for each webhook. Verify: /rep-appt has all fields, /inbound-reply has all fields, /no-show has all fields, VAPI trigger has all fields.

title: Test n8n down - GHL behavior
description: Deactivate n8n workflow, trigger GHL counterpart. Verify: GHL gets error, either retries or continues, contact not stuck.

title: Verify n8n error notifications configured
description: Check n8n Settings → Error Workflow. Verify: Error workflow configured, notifications sent on failure. Silent failures = invisible bugs.

title: Verify GHL workflow execution history
description: Check GHL workflow logs for test contacts. Verify: Can see when ran, branch taken, actions fired, where failures occurred.

title: Test SMS delivery failures
description: Use invalid phone number. Verify: SMS fails, error logged, workflow continues, contact not stuck.

title: Test VAPI service outage handling
description: Check n8n workflow error handling for VAPI API errors. Verify: Error logged, falls back to SMS-only, lead not dropped.

title: Test multiple leads at once
description: Create 5 contacts in 1 minute. Verify: All processed, no webhook backup, no duplicates, n8n handles concurrency, VAPI doesn't call all at once.

title: Check n8n execution limits
description: Check n8n billing → plan → limits. Document: Executions allowed, current usage, headroom at 50 leads/month. Upgrade if needed.
